category_sources: Official BBMap/BBTools site calls BBTools the official suite of bioinformatics tools for DNA and RNA sequence analysis.
source_facts.description: Brian Bushnell's tools for manipulating reads.
display_name_sources: Official BBMap/BBTools site uses BBMap & BBTools and BBTools branding.
Official GitHub repository title is BBTools.
docs_sources: Official BBMap/BBTools site has Documentation, BBTools Guides, and tool pages; official GitHub README is also available.
repo_sources: Official BBMap/BBTools site links Download from GitHub and cites GitHub: https://github.com/bbushnell/BBTools.
Official GitHub README says it is the official BBTools repository maintained by Brian Bushnell.
tags_sources: Official README says BBTools handles FASTQ, FASTA, SAM, BAM, GFF, GTF, VCF, and compressed files.
Official site says BBTools are fast multithreaded tools for DNA and RNA sequence analysis.
